chunks.title: Law on Male Discharge
chunks.reason: Establishes the uncleanness of a male discharge and the required purification rituals.

chunks.title: Law on Seminal Emission
chunks.reason: Defines the uncleanness resulting from a seminal emission for men and women.

chunks.title: Law on Menstrual Impurity
chunks.reason: Details the uncleanness of a woman during her menstrual period and its transmission.

chunks.title: Law on Irregular Female Discharge
chunks.reason: Describes the regulations for a woman with a prolonged blood discharge.

chunks.title: Summary and Conclusion
chunks.reason: Summarizes the purpose of these laws to preserve the tabernacle and lists the covered cases.
